name: Pork Chops with Peanut/Ginger Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat; add oil.
2. Place chops in the skillet and reduce heat to medium.
3. Cook for 7 minutes.
4. Turn chops over.
5. Cook for 5-8 minutes or until chops are no longer pink.
6. Remove chops from the skillet and cover them to keep warm.
7. Drain off fat in the skillet.
8. For sauce, stir into the same skillet chicken broth, peanut butter, onion, lemon juice, garlic powder, and ground ginger.
9. Cook over medium heat about 30 seconds or until slightly thickened.
10. Serve pork chops over cooked noodles and spoon sauce over it.
11. Top with peanuts.
